column1: Hey Lucas, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
The first week of March so the 28th-8th
Bet bro. which destination were we lookin at?
Word Cabos been popular for sure. how many ppl in the group so far?
thats solid bro! you all from the same school?
Oh word we got a good michigan state group hitting Cabo with us
aight bet bet. we lookin to hop on the same package everyone else has? I can hook that up for y'all
Yeah that'd work. How is the safety of the trip with what's been going on in the media recently?

honestly bro I've heard about some of it. I really dont know how real it all is, but, the way our trips are set up everythings very organized. you wont be out there on your own as like a typical Cabo tourist

we pick you up from the airport when you arrive and drop you off at the resort. the resort is gated with security and your not allowed onto the resort without a reservation. our on site staff is there on the resort with you each day and we have a 24/7 assistance hotline in case ever needed
Okay that sounds good. What do the packages look like?
I got you is it cool if I send most of it through email? its a little long for text
word whats the best email to send to
word will send now. how soon were you lookin to get your frat locked in?
No date in mind but would prefer sooner rather than later
word yea bro, prices have been going up by the day. I'll add in the payment plan that lets y'all space things out so you dont have to worry about paying the whole thing right now
just sent that over lmk if it came through
Got it, gonna look it over

bet! I can hook it up with a discount too for the squad if everyones lookin to get on board with it. and as the group leader I can hook you up with a free stay with your group size. we did that with some of the other chapters
Do you have more info on the party package?
yea bro. I'll send that over too. the events we have are Squid Roe, Mandala, and La Vaquita. As well as the booze cruise. all are open bar
just added it to the end of that same email thread
whats good bro. you get to look things over with the boys?
Let me reach out to the group again, but a lot of people are hesitant due to the safety concerns
ahh gotcha, what about a diff destination? we could look at Punta Cana
Half of us went there last spring break. Is there another location you guys have?
and yea bahamas and fort laudy are two other options. cancun too but im assuming theyd have the same concern as cabo there
It was good, we did it thru juscollege and stayed at impressive
word thats wassup. would y'all be open to another resort package? or is punta cana a hard no cause of last year
also would they be into bahamas? if not cabo or punta
yoo Lucas what's good bro, you and the squad get to talk over where you wanna go?
sup Lucas, how we lookin for spring break?
Sorry for the ghost just trying to get the consensus from there group. It's looking like it won't be as many people as originally estimated. It'll most likely be around 20ish people going
With the concerns of pricing and safety some people dropped out
yerr its all good bro, how many ppl you got locked in so far?
oh bet, yea still gonna be lit
prices def moving fast around this time of year so if you got a handful ready to start the reservation I def recommend we get it going
its easier to add ppl to the reservation as we go, than it is to wait til every person is ready and start later on
sup Lucas, how things lookin for spring break?
We are fully down for Cabo. The group is a little smaller than original, it would be around 20ish now I believe. What would the package look like now and what are the payment dates?
aight cool bro, would y'all be ready to start this weekend? we're low on inventory for Cabo so I'll have to request to pull the rooms
Yeah the sooner the better definitely
Aight cool. lemme put the request in and get those set up
would a few ppl be able to deposit by tomorrow to get it active? or even tonight
Lemme ask real quick. How many people would we need
honestly the more the better bro. just want to make sure we can get things secured and not lose the rooms
let me know how many you think we can do and I'll run it by the ops team to see what we can work with
Is the pricing different than the first time you sent me the quotes and are there rooms at tesoro still? I'm dealing with a bunch of broke frat guys that are worried abt the money
Ahh damn I feel you. Pricing is the same rn
Cabo def happens to be the most expensive destination. We do still have availability for Tesoro too at the prices I sent over
Do the guys that are gonna do the deposit book it right now?
Yea, I'll make the reservation and get things set up
How do I get my discount
So I got you slotted as the group leader for this reservation. Once you hit 15 ppl+ which you're gonna get easy, you qualify for a free stay
You do still have to deposit everyone else, but once things are movin and groovin, ppl bay their balances you'll get reimbursed
Gonna get this started rn and email over
It's a little limited right now but I was able to get the rooms pulled. Rooms sleep 3 ppl, I pulled 7
Can we lock in those 7 rooms for us if we get 7 people to pay deposits rn?
Also is there a chance we could get more than 7 rooms if our numbers are higher than 21 or if we could do 4 to a room on a few
yea bro, we can open up more than 7, just wanted to start there
just tried resending, lmk! otherwise ill just text the link
email has a lot more info breakdown with how to get on
So if people don't join tn they are still able to later but prices may go up?
Also is there an option for 4 to a room or no? I've heard from other groups that they have 4 to a room
yea 4 to a room is case by case, just gotta let me know how many we need and I'll put the request in!
Would it be cheaper to have 4 people per room instead of 3 or is it the same price
its 3 at standard. so easier to have 3 and then the occasional 4 as we need
Okay, gave the ultimatum that today is the last day to be in the group. The number is at 23 currently. The plan is to get people to pay the deposit tmr after we get the room groupings decided
Because we have the uneven number would the people stuck with 4 in a room get a discount?
the 4 room may be the same price per person as the 3 person room. I'll ask about that
and okay cool. so we got the 7 that will deposit today to get us rollin, and the rest tomorrow?
Yea we have the 7, would people be able to pay the deposit Sunday as well or is it a strict deadline tmr?
I'll put the note in for sunday, we should be gucci bro
will make it happen for you
How do we do 4 in a room
Yo! Missed your text last night
How many ppl want 4 to a room?
It's by request so we just have to put it in as people ask for it
I'm getting everybody to at least join a room currently just to figure out what rooms are 4
Okay cool yea once we have an idea I can put the request in to see what we can get

yo bro rq, not sure if I asked, I know there were a handful that werent depositing yesterday, how much time did those ppl need? just want to make sure we adjust the reservation accordingly and I can let ops know what the plan is
and then, were there potentially more ppl?

I told everybody they had until tmr night to do the deposit and then there's three people that need to sign up still. Room 7 is one of the rooms with 4 people and I need to figure out what other room will have a fourth
okay bet will adjust the deposit deadline for tomorrow by midnight. and then.. one more room of 3, to make it 8 rooms. then room 7, put the request in for the 4 person? I'll work on all of this rn
Waiting on a response abt the other room that needs a fourth
Sorry for the confusion but I had another guy wanna rip the trip so we're at 24 now. Would we be able to get the 8th room and have only 3 in each room?
All good bro. Yea I can add another room, they ready to hop in now too?
Should be all set now brotha
yoo whats good brotha. hanful of guys haven't made their deposits yet and could potentially lose their spots. Noah, Sabatino, Benjamin, Bradley, Michael, George
Yea ik I've been trying to get them to pay it for a while now
are they not tryna go anymore?
They wanna go still, more trying to figure out how they're gonna pay for it and if their parents are gonna chip in or not
Aight word bro, we just needa know whats good asap cause we cant keep them in a room without anything. takes space from other reservations
I've got the people that haven't paid the deposit yet planning on paying it today. All 24 still plan on going at the moment
yo! word was gonna text you today. ops team has been pressing me about your reservation specifically
Waiting on confirmation from one person, but the rest plan on it today
Is there a payment plan option for the full payment due Friday?
Like to split up that payment?
y'all already have a payment plan for the full package
Is there a chance we could push that payment due date back to December 27th or no?
for which people? I'll put the request in
Preferably all of us if that would work
And I'll have some of the people pay by Friday still
Ill be real bro its gonna be hard for me to ask for anything with there being 5 people not paid
we gotta get those people settled before anything else
Noah, Sabatino, Bradley, Michael T, Georoge
One of them is having an issue signing in. Sabatino forgot his password and the forgot password isn't working
tell Sabatino to try again, go to the slot next to his name and hit join trip
sign in with a new email and password
Not sure, just said he didn't wanna go anymore
Michael T is also backing out of the trip
Sabatino was able to get on?
Yea he figured it out and paid deposit
Now that we have all deposits paid is there a chance you could request the extension till after Christmas? Some of the guys need that money to pay for the trip
Yea will work on that rn bro
With those 2 backing out its gonna change those two rooms to 2 person occupancy. price is a little more per person. those guys cool with that?
Would we be able to just do 7 rooms and have one of the rooms have 4 people?
the max occupancy is 3 unfort. I would
Okay, one sec lemme relay this
How much more expensive would it be for them
What happened to being able to request a room with 4?
I was able to weeks ago. recently it wasn't avail when I tried for another group
Is there a way we can throw a 4th person in one of the rooms we already have reserved?
Nah bro sorry, I just asked again to double confirm
I got the pricing down to $38 more per person for the 2 person room
Is that per night or $38 per person total for only two in a room
Per person for the full trip
And that's just for the people with 2 in a room right
yessir, only for the room of 2
Yea that works for them, are we able to get that extension till after Christmas?
Do we get access to the other Riu hotels with our wristbands?

yo! so the Riu Palace next door particularly, no you dont have access. but there are a couple other Riu's in town you may be able to access their Riu pool parties. but most ppl come to the Riu Sant Fe for the parties there. youre right in the center of it
Sounds good, how long will the refund typically take for me bc of the size of my group?
It's usually all pretty quick once your group is done paying in full. We got Jack, Ben, Bradley and Matt left to get situated. Soon as theyre all good I'll get the process started
Bet, I already texted them about paying
cool man, I'll put in for your reimbursement! should be all good by end of next week
hey brotha, reimbursement is in process! give it 7 business days to hit your account. there is a $75 fee that will be kept on your slot for system and processing fees just so you know
Sounds good, so reimbursement should be just over $1000?
Sounds good, are we able to add the booze cruise anytime before the trip?
yup! right into your portal accounts. each person that wants it can add it
I can also do it for y'all just lmk
I think we're just gonna do it ourselves because I'm not sure everyone wants it
got you. yea just keep me posted
One of the guys on the trip is wondering if he has an opportunity to dj one of the nights at the club. He has performed for juscollege in Punta Cana and Puerto Vallerta.
yoyo! unfortunately we dont have any DJ opportunities avail for Cabo
Looks like it was processed on the 6th brotha. Did you check your original payment method?
Is that last one the refund? Because if so it never went thru to my payment method
It was buried in my statement
How does the ride situation work?

everyone can start adding their flight into into the flight tab on their accounts. once thats done, based on their arrival and departure times, our operations team schedules everyones airport transportation
our team will be there ready as each of you land
Thank you, trying to get everyone in my group to enter their info
wordd yea just lmk if anyone needs any help
How does the booze cruise work?

yo! so once we have everyones flight info situated, your vouchers will become available on your account. there will be a voucher for the booze cruise and any other add ons you have. when you arrive for check in, you'll hit the party pass desk to redeem your tickets and cruise day/time
there will be a bunch of our other travelers going on the cruise with you. boats typically hold 50 ppl or more, some even close to 100 depending on the amount of people going the same day as you
on the cruise itself, its basically an open bar party, the boat stops at a point where people are able to get out into the water if they want
So as a group we decide on a day and time and pick that voucher when we arrive?
typically the on site staff schedules your booze cruise day. theres typically like 2 options per week
its scheduled based on your arrival date
hey'll have you on the booze cruise list when you arrive
yoyo we just need Bradley and Noah's flight info
they happen to be on the same flight as you or anyone else?
I'll have them do it rn
bet bet. were y'all thinkin about adding any of the off resort party pass events? like Squid Roe and Mandala
I don't think so, the groups worried abt going off resort. We are still deciding abt the booze cruise tho
okay cool all good I feel you. just lmk and I got you
things are def safe as long as you go from point a to point b and dont look for trouble
With the news today of the cartel leader getting killed and the outbreak of violence in Mexico some people are wondering abt a possible refund process for the trip
sup brotha. sorry I missed this last night
people who would like to cancel, were able to do so. if they added the insurance they are able to submit a claim to Travel Insured for a refund
at the moment everything is operating as is in Cancun, hotels, flights, etc. The US Embassy just released that all is back to normal this am
if some are still uncomfortable with going to Cancun, down to look at Punta Cana as an alternative
sorry bro meant to type Cabo
Are you able to see who got insurance on the trip? One of the guys is asking
Yoo, only if they went and uploaded it to their account afterward
some people get it and dont upload it so we dont always know
One of the guys on my trip is leaving Thursday the 5th instead of Friday the 6th. Will he still get transportation to the airport?
yea he'll be good. did he put that info into his account?
Okay bet then he'll be all set
